title: Potion Recipes Brewing
description: Adds recipe for brewing potions for Minecraft non-potion effects.
body:
# Potion Brew
A lightweight vanilla-style Fabric mod that adds new brewable potions to Minecraft using existing in-game effects.

Potion Brew focuses on simple and balanced brewing additions that feel like they belong in vanilla Minecraft.

## Features
#### New Brewable Potions
- Potion of Glowing
- Potion of Darkness
- Potion of Levitation
- Potion of Haste
- Potion of Luck
- Potion of Unluck
- Potion of Nausea
- Potion of Saturation

#### All potions use existing vanilla Minecraft effects.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Brewing 

- Glowing	- Glow Ink Sac
- Darkness - Echo Shard
- Levitation - Shulker Shell
- Haste - Raw Gold Block
- Luck - Emerald
- Unluck - Rotten Flesh
- Nausea - Poisonous Potato
- Saturation - Honey Block

</details>



#### Base potion for all recipes:
Awkward Potion
